retrieved_passages.title: Senior Pet Support
retrieved_passages.content: A senior pet plan should prioritize consistency over intensity. When time is limited, essential care such as feeding, hydration, medication reminders, and mobility support should be scheduled before optional enrichment.

retrieved_passages.title: Kidney Diet and Hydration Support
retrieved_passages.content: Pets on kidney-support diets often need strict consistency around meals and hydration. Wet-food feeding schedules, water refreshes, and appetite monitoring are common routine tasks that owners can track day by day.

retrieved_passages.title: Enrichment and Daily Monitoring
retrieved_passages.content: Daily care plans are stronger when they combine essential care with realistic enrichment and observation. Short play, sniff walks, brushing, or calm interaction can improve quality of life without requiring large blocks of time.

retrieved_passages.title: Kidney Diet and Hydration Support
retrieved_passages.content: Care plans for kidney-support diets should avoid vague feeding advice and instead focus on reminders, monitoring, and documenting whether the prescribed routine was completed.

retrieved_passages.title: Enrichment and Daily Monitoring
retrieved_passages.content: When the day's schedule is tight, a planner should preserve high-priority essentials first and then fill remaining time with short enrichment or monitoring tasks that still fit the available budget.

raw_recommendations.name: Midday wet food and hydration check
raw_recommendations.notes: Serve second meal portion and refresh water bowl. Observe appetite and water intake as part of kidney-diet monitoring.
raw_recommendations.rationale: Kidney-diet pets require strict meal consistency and hydration tracking. A midday feeding maintains the prescribed routine and allows direct observation of appetite and drinking behavior.

raw_recommendations.name: Evening wet food and appetite log
raw_recommendations.notes: Serve final meal, document whether Luna ate the full portion, and note any changes in appetite or behavior.
raw_recommendations.rationale: Consistent evening feeding completes the kidney-support routine. Documentation of appetite helps track kidney-diet compliance and alerts to any changes requiring attention.

raw_recommendations.name: Water bowl refresh and hydration observation
raw_recommendations.notes: Refresh water bowl with fresh water. Note whether Luna is drinking regularly throughout the day.
raw_recommendations.rationale: Hydration monitoring is essential for kidney-diet pets. Regular water refreshes and observation of drinking patterns support the prescribed routine and help catch any changes early.

raw_recommendations.name: Calm interaction and light enrichment
raw_recommendations.notes: Gentle play, quiet brushing, or calm interaction. Keep activity low-intensity and brief to suit senior needs and available time.
raw_recommendations.rationale: With 45 minutes available and 30 minutes committed to essential feeding and hydration, 10 minutes of light enrichment improves quality of life without compromising kidney-care priorities. Senior pets benefit from calm, consistent interaction.
